title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. nivalis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. nivalis, also known as snow-kissed kidney vetch or snow-orchid, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant that is native to high-altitude, cold regions. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. nivalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
